title: YellyHommy No Hook Shower Curtain with Snap in Fabric Liner Set Less Time White Waffle Shower Curtain for Bathroom 81" L x 72" W
features: 【No Hook Shower Curtain Set】: Install in 20 seconds without the hassle of annoying and messy hooks, and no need to remove the rod!
【Removable Snap On/Off Liner】: The water-repellent snap on/off fabric liner is easy to remove, making it convenient for cleaning or replacement, with 2 bottom magnets on both corners

【Top Sheer Window】: A mesh upper panel lets in light while maintaining privacy. You can look out of the top part to keep an eye on things outside the shower, such as your partner, pets, or the time etc

【Hotel and Spa Vision】: This no hook waffle shower curtain with a snap-on liner set creates a hotel-inspired bathroom. You'll feel like you're pampering yourself at a hotel spa whenever you take a shower. You will love the fit of the shower curtain and the fact that it has an inner liner. The outer layer does a great job of wicking water to keep it dry

【Dimensions】: This no hook shower curtain set is 72" (from left to right) x 81" (from top to bottom). It also comes with a replaceable fabric liner of 71"W x 61"L that can be easily cleaned by wiping it directly or by machine washing
description: Product description This innovative No Hook Shower Curtain with Liner Set features a unique waffle fabric design and comes with a snap-on replaceable waterproof fabric liner for easy cleaning and long-term use. The built-in loop design allows for easy on and off, while the mesh upper panel allows light and air to circulate, providing a spa-like shower experience with privacy. With its self-hanging design and built-in grommets, this hotel-quality shower curtain saves both time and money. Upgrade your bathroom with the YellyHommy No Hook Shower Curtain for an effortless and stylish shower solution. Safety Warning Keep away from open flames and sharp objects. Do not overload the hooks. Keep magnets away from children and pets.
